zh.La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergn: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o拉 圖-達奧維
zh.Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o奧利格斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy II de la Tour於1325年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o奧利格斯時，他的父親Bertrand III de La Tour D'auvergne22歲，母親Isabelle II de Levis-Mirepoix21歲。他於1353年12月17日與Marthe Roger de Beaufort結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1375年9月17日在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy II de la Tour于1325年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o奧利格斯时，他的父亲Bertrand III de La Tour D'auvergne22岁，母亲Isabelle II de Levis-Mirepoix21岁。他于1353年12月17日与Marthe Roger de Beaufort结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1375年9月17日在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Tour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Thür): habitational name from Thür near Koblenz, or from Thur in Brandenburg and Pomerania.

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Erland, Eyvind, Nels.  Southeast Asian Chor, Tong, Chia, Chu, Kong, Seng, Tou, Chee, Ching, Chou, Chue, Eng, Thai, Moua, Neng, Pao, Yeng, Yer, Blong, Chong, Choua, Houa, Shoua, Soua.
Swedish and Danish: from a short form of any of various Scandinavian personal names containing the first element Thor (Old Norse Thórr), the name of the god of thunder in Scandinavian mythology.
English: from the Anglo-Scandinavian name Thōr, Thūr, probably short forms of Old Norse compound names in Thór-, Thúr- (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy II de la Tour was born in 1325, in Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Bertrand III de La Tour D'auvergne, was 22 and his mother, Isabelle II de Levis-Mirepoix, was 21. He married Marthe Roger de Beaufort on 17 December 1353. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 17 September 1375, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy II de la Tour est né en 1325, à Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Bertrand III de La Tour D'auvergne, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabelle II de Levis-Mirepoix, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Marthe Roger de Beaufort le 17 décembre 1353. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1375, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy II de la Tour 1325 in Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bertrand III de La Tour D'auvergne 22 und seine Mutter Isabelle II de Levis-Mirepoix 21. Er hat am 17. Dezember 1353 Marthe Roger de Beaufort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 17. September 1375 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy II de la Tour è nato il nel 1325 nel Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Bertrand III de La Tour D'auvergne, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle II de Levis-Mirepoix, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Marthe Roger de Beaufort il 17 dicembre 1353. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 17 settembre 1375, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランド
ja.La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergn: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメラ トウル-ド'アウバーグン
ja.Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメオリールグス
ja.lifeSummary: Guy II de la Tourが1325年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメオリールグスで生まれた時，父Bertrand III de La Tour D'auvergneは22歳，母Isabelle II de Levis-Mirepoixは21歳であった。1353年12月17日にMarthe Roger de Beaufortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1375年9月17日に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy II de la Tour(이)가 1325년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 리르구스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bertrand III de La Tour D'auvergne(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle II de Levis-Mirepoix(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1353년 12월 17일 Marthe Roger de Beaufort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1375년 9월 17일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy II de la Tour nasceu em 1325, em Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Bertrand III de La Tour D'auvergne, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle II de Levis-Mirepoix, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Marthe Roger de Beaufort em 17 de dezembro de 1353. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1375, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy II de la Tour родился в 1325 г. в местности оллииргуесь, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Bertrand III de La Tour D'auvergne было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle II de Levis-Mirepoix, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Marthe Roger de Beaufort 17 декабря 1353 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 17 сентября 1375 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy II de la Tour nació en 1325, en Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Bertrand III de La Tour D'auvergne, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Isabelle II de Levis-Mirepoix, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Marthe Roger de Beaufort el 17 de diciembre de 1353. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1375, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
